name: Exposure of WSDL File Containing Sensitive Information
description: The product exposes a WSDL file that contains sensitive information about web service methods, endpoints, or internal structure. Attackers can use this information to guess private method names or discover hidden functionality.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL or META node exposing service definition (WSDL, API schema) via EGRESS without AUTH or CONTROL node restricting access to the definition resource
